title: Common protocol v1alpha1 definitions
description: Shared enum and reference definitions for the cross-host/cross-repository protocol documents (Observation, HostKnowledge, Report, Generation, Evidence, RepairProposal) described in docs/architecture/README.md §6 (schemas/protocol vs schemas/domain split). These $defs are documentation of the wire contract; like schemas/domain, nothing in this repository executes a generic JSON Schema validator against them yet (no third-party dependency is available offline) — internal/domain hand-writes the equivalent Go validators and fixture tests.

digest.description: A stable content digest, always the algorithm-prefixed hex form produced by domain.CanonicalDigest (docs/architecture/README.md §5.4, §9).

evidenceLevel.description: docs/architecture/reporting.md §4, Evidence Levels: E0 DISCOVERED, E1 PARSED, E2 RESOLVED, E3 HOST_REPORTED, E4 BEHAVIOR_PROBED, E5 EXTERNALLY_PROVEN. Evidence is monotonic only when the higher level proves the same claim.

guaranteeLevel.description: docs/architecture/reporting.md §5, Guarantee Levels. Independent of evidenceLevel: evidence answers why we believe a result, guarantee answers what prevents it from changing.

capabilityLevel.description: docs/knowledge/README.md §5, Capability Vocabulary, for one host x surface x version x concept x operation cell. Distinct from the ontology's cross-host classification vocabulary in docs/ontology/README.md §1.2 (EXACT/PARTIAL/VENDOR_ONLY/ABSENT/UNKNOWN), which is a different, smaller enum for a different question.

reconcileMode.description: docs/knowledge/README.md §5: the reconcile mode a capability resolves to is independent of the capabilityLevel relation itself. There is no host-wide supported flag.

knowledgeStatus.description: docs/knowledge/README.md §7, Lifecycle States, for one Knowledge Pack.

sourceDisposition.description: docs/architecture/reporting.md §3, Source Disposition: why a discovered source does or does not take effect.

ownership.description: docs/architecture/README.md §10, Ownership. Lowercase, matching the doc verbatim (unlike the other enums on this page).

hostId.$comment: Re-declared rather than $ref'd across directories: this repository does not execute a generic JSON Schema resolver, so a cross-file $ref would be documentation-only either way. Kept identical to schemas/domain/common.v1alpha1.schema.json#/$defs/hostId (docs/ontology/README.md §4, Host Registry) and to internal/domain.KnownHostIDs; a golden test in internal/domain cross-checks the two lists do not drift apart.
